hero.title: Reuniting lost pets with their families
hero.subtitle: Report, search and share. Together we find your companion.

step1.title: 1. Post
step1.description: Upload photos, description and the last location where your pet was seen.

step2.title: 2. Search the map
step2.description: Explore nearby reports on the interactive map. Filter by type, breed and location.

step3.title: 3. Share
step3.description: Share on WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook and Twitter to maximize the search.

shelters.title: Shelters & Organizations
